violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -No hand wash while on-site, made and received payment for 2 separate orders.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. -Employee with long hair (pass shoulders) and no hair restraint.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoop stored with handle in brown sugar.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Fabric curtains used to cover corner cabinets below espresso machine.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface used with potentially hazardous food was not cleaned every four hours while in use or as frequently as required. -Dishes are only washed at end of day-5 and 5.5 hour shifts. (Coffee pitchers, shake pitchers, stir spoons, etc.)--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Surfaces throughout due for deep clean: i.e. Residue/debris at bottom interior of freezer and at refrigerator door shleves; Coffee grounds/dust at all counter tops; Splatter at walls behind syrups; residue below sinks, debris at interior of cabinet below espresso machine.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. Dishes are being washed and rinsed in middle sink and left to air dry over night in 3rd sink. (bag of ice placed in 3rd sink when needed for an order).

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -2 stacks of single use foam trays were not stored inverted at top storage shelf.
General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -Drive through window without screen left during inspection.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insect electrocution or trapping device was installed in an inappropriate location. -Fly strip installed at wall above syrups.
Provided, maintained (3 pts deducted)
